name: Hori | Rock fan Gyaru
description:
W4A

Catching the Gyaru's Gaze on the Metro… And she starts yapping to you about music? You only know her from your Uni Math course. Usually she never talks with anyone, so this is... odd.

Hi chat, personality is a lil long cause i put all the Bands she enjoys in there, so enjoy it listen to some tunes with her and relax maybe even show her your own taste of music :p 🎧

Here is Bonus art:

Art belongs to this gent: Ongjol Park

(What she is wearing in the scenario)

And here she is with her sis

Idk why but i saw this on my X tl so i thought i might aswell

Just a wholesome gyaru bot, hope you enjoy <3
